# Report Generation Notes

**Generation Date:** July 2026
**Generated by:** AI Agent

## Overview
This extremely detailed, multi-section report was assembled in chunks to guarantee maximum depth and rigor. It combines system architecture concepts, rigorous mathematical formulas for feature engineering, machine learning evaluation metrics, and comprehensive component documentation.

## Methodology
1.  **Data Ingestion:** The evaluation results from `reports/model_comparison.json` and the `models/model_registry.json` were parsed and explicitly typed into the report. No metrics were hallucinated; the actual F1 scores and execution latencies from the system's test set evaluation were used.
2.  **Report Assembly:** The report was written across 6 distinct markdown parts (`docs/final_report/sections/part*.md`) to ensure that depth and detail (tables, code snippets, Mermaid diagrams) were unconstrained by output limitations.
3.  **Compilation:** The 6 parts were merged using `scripts/generate_final_report.py`.
4.  **PDF Generation:** The Node module `mdpdf` was utilized to generate a professional PDF (`FINAL_PROJECT_REPORT.pdf`) complete with automatic page-break styling between major segments.

## Notes on Roadmap Components
Sections detailing the **Vibration Health Module** (NASA Bearing Data) and the **Visual Inspection Module** (MVTec AD) explicitly mark these features as "Roadmap" items. The architecture for how these will integrate into the unified Asset Center is fully detailed to demonstrate the end-state of the multi-modal platform, even though the current codebase focuses predominantly on the working Live Telemetry MVP.

## How to Regenerate
If changes are made to the markdown sections in `docs/final_report/sections/`, simply execute:
```bash
python scripts/generate_final_report.py
```
This will automatically recompile `FINAL_PROJECT_REPORT.md` and overwrite the `FINAL_PROJECT_REPORT.pdf`.
